name: Chicken Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 4 red and green bell peppers, cut into strips
1 large vidalia onion, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup lemon juice, 3 tablespoons olive oil (or vegetable oil), and 3 tablespoons red wine vinegar to make a marinade.
2. Place chicken in a shallow glass or non-reactive dish.
- Method One: Sprinkle salt, lemon pepper, and garlic powder over the chicken. Pour the marinade over the chicken and tightly cover the dish. Marinate for at least 1 hour, or overnight. Grill marinated breasts over hot coals for about 15 minutes, or until white. For best results, cook over mesquite. Cut grilled chicken into strips.
- Method Two: Toss salt, lemon pepper, and garlic powder with chicken pieces. Pour the marinade over the chicken and cover tightly. Heat a small amount of olive oil (or vegetable oil) in a wok or large frying pan. Briefly stir fry chicken with marinade until white and cooked through.
3. Cut green peppers, red peppers, and onion into strips. Grill or stir fry separately from meat. Serve chicken and vegetables with warmed tortillas and guacamole, salsa.
